description: Create a mouse-tracking experiment in PsychoPy Builder to study decision dynamics by recording continuous mouse trajectories. The experiment must utilize a conditions file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/competitors.csv with columns for target_word, distractor_word, and correct_side containing at least four word pairs. Ensure the experiment starts each trial from a button at the bottom-center (y = -0.7) and captures the mouse state every frame during the selection of words displayed at the top of the screen. Save the experiment file to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/mouse_tracking.psyexp.
